scenario: Adverse Event — PQC+AE combo: a device defect that ALSO injured the patient (defaults to AE/PV).
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Email

Reporting a problem: my ArthriFree pre-filled syringe cracked while I was injecting it this morning, and the medicine sprayed onto my forearm. Within an hour I developed a red, raised, itchy rash where it contacted my skin. The device clearly malfunctioned but I also reacted to it.

— Sandra Mills (patient)
labeling_notes: BOTH a product quality defect (cracked syringe) AND a patient reaction (rash).
Single-label taxonomy: AE wins for safety triage -> PV. (In production this dual-routes to QA + PV; our model classifies the safety event.)
